commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh 2 Chronicles 29:7 Also they have shut up the doors of the vestibule, and put out the lamps, and have not burned incense nor offered burnt offerings in the holy place unto the God of Israel. At the same time, is not in Hebrew (Calmet) or Septuagint. (Haydock) Zechri, one of the generals of Phacee, slew the king's son, after the engagement. Joseph and Aman enjoyed the like dignity, Genesis xli. , and Esther xiii. The high priests had also seconds, 4 Kings xxv. Septuagint, "vicar of the king.

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
